release.name: n8n@2.10.4
release.body:
## [2.10.4](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/compare/n8n@2.10.3...n8n@2.10.4) (2026-03-06)


### Bug Fixes

* **ai-builder:** Don't use autoGenerate for UUID columns for WFB persistence migration (backport to release-candidate/2.10.x) ([#26595](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/26595)) ([f7f652a](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/f7f652a5a72620fb360873645e4ba2375ea1ff18))
* **Form Node:** Improve form rendering consistency (backport to release-candidate/2.10.x) ([#26653](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/26653)) ([9580ec9](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/9580ec937c86bf0d7e4e36722bd52fd10c0604ad))
* Log streaming config works with proxy (backport to release-candidate/2.10.x) ([#26591](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/26591)) ([13c4eb4](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/13c4eb4755432194da9aba20c92c99e69c186652))

**Form Node:** Improve form rendering consistency (backport to release-candidate/2.10.x) ([#26653](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/26653)) ([9580ec9](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/9580ec937c86bf0d7e4e36722bd52fd10c0604ad))
